title: JS Leaves+ for Biomes O' Plenty
description: This resource pack improves the foliage in Biomes O' Plentyby adding volume to it.
body:
Replace the standard leaf model for a more enjoyable game with the Biomes O' Plenty mod.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cb80a00a615cf08bfc4b337ab5c6d7c6f8d07a4.png)
